textPlain: Are you funded and/or connected? The page didn't really load to the bottom where I assume stuff like that might appear.

Hey! This is a project I've been working on, currently getting a radiation rating on some flight electronics! Basically, getting cargo from LEO/SSO to Mars/deep space destinations on the cheap! Criticism and comments are appreciated!
There's not much on the page right now! It's kinda a rough draft. We have some NASA and JHU APL connections so far!
